use std::sync::Arc;
use tokio::sync::Mutex;

async fn process_batch(items: Vec<String>, state: Arc<Mutex<Vec<String>>>) {
    let mut guard = state.lock().await;
    for item in items {
        let result = fetch_remote(&item).await;
        guard.push(result);
    }
}

async fn fetch_remote(url: &str) -> String {
    format!("result for {}", url)
}
